prestazioni: Replace the stock 4A-GE (16-valve, 1.6L, 120-130 PS) engine internals with forged pistons (JE 87mm forged slugs, 10.5:1 CR) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods, paired with a Tomei Type-M 264° camshaft (intake/exhaust) for high-RPM power delivery (8,500 RPM redline).

Install a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold (Sparco 4-2-1 design) and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller (set to 1.2 bar peak pressure) for 280-300 PS at the wheels.

Upgrade the stock T50 5-speed transmission with a Quaife ATB helical LSD, reinforced synchros (OS Giken 2nd/3rd gear sets), and a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch (ceramic-metallic friction material) for durability under high-torque loads.
estetica: Fit a Vertex Lang II widebody kit (specific to the A60 Carina GT chassis) with custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon) and rear diffuser (Rocket Bunny V3), retaining the original pop-up headlights but adding Hella 500 fog lights in the lower bumper.

Install a set of Work Meister S1 3P 15x8.5-inch wheels (ET+15, 4x100 PCD) with Toyo R888R 225/50R15 tires, paired with BC Racing BR Type-Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) for aggressive stance and track-ready damping.

Replace the stock interior with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (suede), and a full Cusco bolt-in 8-point roll cage (chromoly, powder-coated white) with integrated harness bar for motorsport safety.
